title: object-designer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the object-designer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

business_concept.description: Example from AGENT.md: "Track maintenance contracts linked to Accounts, with a primary technician and warranty expiration" Required column: 'yes'.
business_concept.example: "Track maintenance contracts linked to Accounts, with a primary technician and warranty expiration"

target_org_alias.description: Example from AGENT.md: live-org probe confirms existing model, prevents duplicate design Required column: 'yes'.
target_org_alias.example: live-org probe confirms existing model, prevents duplicate design

expected_row_volume.description: Example from AGENT.md: `small` (< 100k), `medium` (100k–10M), `large` (> 10M). Defaults to `medium`. Drives LDV advice Required column: 'no'.

integration_source.description: Example from AGENT.md: external system name if rows will be sourced via integration — drives External ID + upsert recommendations Required column: 'no'.
integration_source.example: external system name if rows will be sourced via integration — drives External ID + upsert recommendations

sensitivity.description: Example from AGENT.md: `standard` / `pii` / `phi` / `pci` — drives encryption + access recommendations Required column: 'no'.
